title: ageratina harlingii
intro: Ageratina harlingii, also known as Harling's ageratina, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, including relief from digestive issues, reduced inflammation, and improved immune function. Ageratina harlingii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
